title: Master Finance Parcours Finance d'entreprise et ingénierie financière
official_degree_name: Master Finance Parcours Finance d'entreprise et ingénierie financière
program_description: Official Master Finance page with code MR10701A-LIB, 120 credits, Bac+5 exit level, M1/M2 admission structure, Liban centre offering years 2026/2027 and 2027/2028, and accreditation through 2029-2030.
admission_requirements: M1 entry is based on dossier review for Bac+3/equivalent candidates in a compatible domain, with professional experience preferred. M2 entry is possible after validating M1 or through direct dossier/test/interview review for Bac+4+ candidates.
interview_requirement: Direct M2 entry may include test/interview review for Bac+4+ candidates.
experience_requirement: Professional experience is preferred for M1 candidates.
notes: The official page confirms the programme code, 120-credit structure, Bac+5 exit level, and Liban centre offering years 2026/2027 and 2027/2028.

title: Master mathématiques appliquées, statistique Parcours Science des données
official_degree_name: Master mathématiques appliquées, statistique Parcours Science des données
program_description: Official Master page with code MR12303A-LIB, 120 credits, Bac+5 exit level, prerequisites, dossier-based M2 admission, Liban centre offering years 2026/2027 and 2027/2028, and accreditation through 2029-2030.
admission_requirements: Accessible to holders of a Licence/Bac+3 in statistics, econometrics, applied mathematics, or an equivalent qualification. Bac+4 holders may enter M2, and M2 admission is decided by jury on dossier.
notes: The official page confirms the programme code, 120-credit structure, Bac+5 exit level, and Liban centre offering years 2026/2027 and 2027/2028.

title: Master entrepreneuriat et management de projet Parcours Management de projet et d'affaires

program_description: Official Master page with code MR12001A-LIB, 120 credits, Bac+5 exit level, apprenticeship marked yes, and accreditation through 2029-2030.
admission_requirements: M1 entry is open mainly to Bac+3/licence/equivalent candidates in compatible domains, with selection on dossier.
notes: The official page confirms the programme code, 120-credit structure, apprenticeship marker, and the selected-on-dossier admission text. The captured centre-offering block did not show Liban year rows, so this record is retained with the official programme page as evidence.
